Cloak of the Seacaller  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: BACK
AC: 10
INT: +8 MANA: +65
SV FIRE: +3 SV DISEASE: +3 SV COLD: +3 SV MAGIC: +3 SV POISON: +3
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: WIZ MAG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Cloak of the Seacaller
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: BACK
AC: 10
INT: +8 MANA: +65
SV FIRE: +3 SV DISEASE: +3 SV COLD: +3 SV MAGIC: +3 SV POISON: +3
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: WIZ MAG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Lore:Seacaller's Cloak
Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-25 10:12:48
Page Updated:Fri Jan 22nd, 2021

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 50
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Siren's Grotto
NPC Name
a siren coercer
Mistress Latazura
The Fabled Mistress Latazura


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Siren's Grotto


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
siren coercer
QuoteReply
# Sep 29 2003 at 10:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762349640
View User Forum
52 posts
this cloak also drops in the tower off of "a siren coercer", a named mob that spawns in place of "a siren enticer". they are far easier to get to than Mistress Latazura, and easy to kill for a mid 50's group. the cloak seems to be the rare drop, i have seen 2 drop in about 7 or 8 kills.
▲ Page top
a siren coercer
QuoteReply
# Jan 08 2011 at 12:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1618186627876
Scholar
104 posts
confirmed today

'a siren coercer' drops
Cloak of the Seacaller

seems to be very rare

1/12/2011 just got another cloak drop on coercer today; this is unusual because I must have killed more than 40 with no cloak and now 2 in a row...
1/13/2011 cloak of seacaller again - 'a siren coercer'

3 Cloak of the Seacaller in row on 'a siren coercer' after not seeing one for months/years...


Edited, Jan 13th 2011 5:22pm by Harmoniq
▲ Page top
Drop
QuoteReply
# Apr 08 2002 at 12:47 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591754717479
Sage
68 posts
Could someone please post what drops this? I want to go get one but it would be nice to know what I am looking for.
▲ Page top
RE: Drop
QuoteReply
# Apr 08 2002 at 10:56 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591754717479
Sage
68 posts
Ok, finally got a reply on another board so I will share the Info =)

Mistress Latazura
Level 63-65 about 100k+ hps
Quad's max hit is 375
She is a Siren Enchanter and is not slowable.
She spawns in the siren building with 3 bridges leading into it... fairly close to zoneline.

Drops:
Cloak of the Seacaller: AC: +10 Int: +8 All Resists +3 Mana: +65
Gloomwater Bow 25/55 4 to all resists procs 40% snare
Lyendlln's Lute 10ac 25hp bard insturment +30% lute songs
The Runed Sea Shell's for the 9th ring and 7th prayer shawl quests.
Sleeves of the Kelpmaidens 3ac 10str effect Enduring Breath

This information was kindly provided by Annihilus Maximus on the Saryrn Tavern boards.
▲ Page top
RE: Drop
QuoteReply
# Oct 04 2002 at 4:09 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591777780548
View User Forum
8 posts
I can confirm the MOB that drops this, listed above.

Late at night, a very kind Shaman called out in the market channel on Inny server that one of these was rotting with 18mins on the timer, and for someone to come get it.

I got it. Only cost me a death, and the shammy dragged my corpse to zone.

Compared to a Heiro cloak...it is very very tough to say which is better...today. The HP on the Heiro are tempting, though. And, really, a lot of gear is very situational at the high end.

That said, for me, with PoP offering the chance to raise stat caps and base stats even more using AA...I would go for this cloak, even if it cost more than one mad dash to SG and a death.
------------
Thank you again, Grim. You sir, are one of the Good Guys. :)

edit - ah to be able to actually type.
edit2 - ARGH!

Edited, Fri Oct 4 16:54:59 2002

She IS slowable. We slowed her with a 57 shamen.
Might have been in a patch but she is slowable now.

▲ Page top
Heiro?
QuoteReply
# Sep 02 2001 at 7:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757869421
11 posts

What do people think about this vs heiro for a higher level int caster? Since +int (or +any stat really) isn't a big concern, and mostly it's just mana, hps, resists... We're looking at Heiro as 75 hp 75 mana, vs Seacaller at 65 mana and +3 all saves....

I mean.. even if there was no better resist gear for whatever resistance mob you are fighting for back slot, would you give up 75 hps and 10 mana to get +3 to the resist you need?
▲ Page top
RE: Heiro?
QuoteReply
# Jan 18 2002 at 11:18 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591750106032
View User Forum
Scholar
221 posts
Post-Luclin they have upped the soft-cap on Int, so yes, this item is now even more the choice ofer Heiro.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Sep 01 2001 at 5:44 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This item is great, i've been looking for an upgrade for my raw silk for some time now... 0.0 Can you say monk item!!

# Sep 01 2001 at 7:37 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591766838892

Can you say......

class-WIZ MAG

Blivion Soulryder
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 01 2001 at 1:49 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) No. But I CAN say DIE. Which is exactly what the person you posted in response to should do. Crawl back into your hole monk, you're not wanted out here.
#Anonymous, Posted: Sep 01 2001 at 6:54 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Can you say Sarcasm? Find a hole of your own to crawl into you simpleton, and pull it in behind yourself.
compare to mystic cloak
QuoteReply
# Sep 01 2001 at 3:53 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750388498
100 posts
Mystic Cloak:
+8 AC +5 Int +5 vsMg
Cloak of the Seacaller:
+10 AC +3 vsMg +3 vsFire +3 vsCold +3 vsPos +3 vsDis +65 Mana (and +8 int too but allakhazam hasn't listed that yet).

A very very nice non-planar upgrade. So knowing Verant this probably drops of boss mobs in Siren's.
And this Seacaller bit? Mages and wizards get to call the sea? What - names?



▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 31 2001 at 9:13 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) That means agree for you non college educated.. but seriously it is a nice item I wouldn't mind grabbing one if I was a wizard or magician but I am not so it is a shame :) It does appear to be a little weak on the resists? or is that just because I am use to the ToV armor?
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 31 2001 at 8:28 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) sorry couldnt resist, responding to the first post if you cant tell )
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 01 2001 at 1:47 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Die.
Nice
QuoteReply
# Aug 31 2001 at 7:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
What a very nice cloak. +65 mana would be great by itself, if it had no other stats. Also, it's not monk equippable, so the "oh, look 0.0 weight, its a monk item" debate will never surface. Anyone know if there is a wis caster version of this?
▲ Page top
RE: Nice
QuoteReply
# Sep 04 2001 at 1:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249878417
4 posts
Kindly don't bash the entire monk community for the posts of a VERY small number of us.

Even if this was monk equippable, there's a good half a dozen back-slot items that are better for monks than this one. 0 weight does not automagically make an item something a monk would use, even if they could.
